name: Corned Beef and Cabbage (New England Boiled Dinner)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the corned beef until tender.
2. While the corned beef is cooking, cook the beets separately until tender, then peel and reserve them.
3. Add the cooked onions to the simmering stock for an additional 15 minutes.
4. Add the parsnips, carrots, turnips, and potatoes (cut into wedges) to the pot. Simmer until all vegetables are tender (about 10-15 minutes).
5. When everything is cooked, remove the beef from the pot and let it rest in the stock for about 30 minutes.
6. Reheat the meat in the stock before serving.
7. Serve the corned beef on a platter with the vegetables surrounding it. Garnish with parsley if using.
8. If there is leftover cabbage or other ingredients, use them to make RED FLANNEL HASH by chopping and browning the mixture in a skillet with 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil until a brown crust forms.
